data.description:
## Why
Field evidence since the 2026-07-08 plan-review recalibration (782 runs / 225 tickets): 18% of tickets need 4+ review rounds and the sticky tail consumes 60% of gate compute; 38 PASS->BLOCK flips (22 remediation-induced, 16 pure sampling-miss); 32% verdict instability on byte-identical plans; 95% of remediation edits mint new findings (net +324 across 430 edit rounds). The shipped cross-round convergence machinery — the plan-review rising floor (epic 7d43, child ec89/cc5b) and the code-review region-gated floor (e05c4b531) — is INERT behind default-False flags. The operator has authorized flipping the evidence gate ON BY DEFAULT on this field evidence (superseding the discriminates_novelty-eval prerequisite), with a follow-up task to remove the flags entirely.

## What
- In src/rebar/_config_schema.py flip `remediation_mode: bool = False` -> `True` (~line 264) and `novelty_drop_active: bool = False` -> `True` (~line 282); rewrite the adjacent comments (no longer 'default OFF v1' / 'evidence gate stays inert until flipped manually') to state default-ON with explicit-false as the back-out.
- Update default tables/prose in docs/config.md (~lines 107, 118) and docs/plan-review-gate.md (~lines 322-374) to the new defaults, noting the operator-authorized flip.
- Update tests pinning the old defaults (e.g. tests/unit/test_plan_review_rising_floor.py:166 asserts novelty_drop_active is False by default); keep the off-path (triple-gate) tests via explicit False configs.
- NON-GOALS: completion_floor_active (epic 66ac, separate evidence gate) stays False; novelty_drop_threshold (0.7) / novelty_priority_floor (0.4) unchanged; no behavior change to the floor math itself.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] VerifyConfig.remediation_mode and VerifyConfig.novelty_drop_active default to True in src/rebar/_config_schema.py; setting either to false in config still restores byte-identical full-review behavior (back-out preserved and tested).
- [ ] All tests asserting the old False defaults are updated; the floor's off-paths remain covered via explicit False configs; make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
- [ ] docs/config.md and docs/plan-review-gate.md default tables/prose reflect the True defaults and record that the flip was operator-authorized on field evidence in lieu of the discriminates_novelty eval.
- [ ] completion_floor_active remains default False (explicit non-goal), asserted or left untouched by tests.
data.title: Convergence floors on by default: flip remediation_mode + novelty_drop_active defaults to True
